## Status definitions

- **Implemented ‚Äî internally tested**: Rust code exists, unit tests pass, but no oracle comparison has been run.
- **Implemented ‚Äî unverified against oracle**: Rust code exists, has not been tested against the real ntpd.
- **Scaffold**: type/signature only, no behavioral implementation.
- **Planned**: not yet started.

**No surface is labelled `Ported` until `cargo xtask parity` produces a verified evidence artifact against the real OpenNTPD 7.9p1 oracle.**
